text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has kicked off for King Halo! She
announces the lodge will one day become famous
as the place she once trained at. But her
ambitious renovation plans lack her usual
enthusiasm in the intense heat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The main thing on her mind is installing an air
conditioner, which seems rather modest for a
dreamer like King Halo.
